title: Coordinate Magic
description: Use variables to store and work with positions on the farm - master coordinate-based navigation.

phases.title: Understanding Coordinates
phases.description: Learn the x, y coordinate system

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Every location on the farm has coordinates—an x position (left-right) and y position (up-down).

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Like a map grid? X for horizontal and Y for vertical?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Your current position might be x=10, y=5. We can store these in variables to remember important locations.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Let's store a target location. Create two variables: target_x = 10 and target_y = 5

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So I can remember where to go later by looking at these variables?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Instead of hardcoding positions everywhere, you store them once and reference them.

objectives.description: Create the y position variable too

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Perfect! Now you have a stored location you can use throughout your code.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Now navigate to your stored position. Use your target_x and target_y variables to calculate how to move there.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So I need to figure out how many moves up/down and left/right based on the variables?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Yes! Though for now, you can just create the logic to reference those positions. Advanced movement using variables will come later!

objectives.description: Navigate to a position using position variables as reference

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: I made it to the position I stored!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Excellent! Position variables are powerful for managing waypoints and farm plots.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: What if you have multiple farm plots? You could create plot1_x, plot1_y, plot2_x, plot2_y, etc.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: That would let me remember all my important farming locations!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Later you'll learn about lists and dictionaries which make this even easier. For now, create variables for 3 different plot positions.

objectives.description: Create multiple position variables (at least 3 different locations, use position naming like plot1_x, plot1_y, etc.)

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: Now I have variables storing all my farm plot locations!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Perfect! Position variables are essential for managing complex farms. Next, we'll combine everything you've learned!

rewards.description: Unlocked quest: The Smart Farm Manager
